# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/build/duckdb-cmake
# It was generated by CMake: /usr/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//Debug setting: use alternative verify mode
ALTERNATIVE_VERIFY:BOOL=OFF

//Enable building of the benchmark suite.
BUILD_BENCHMARKS:BOOL=0

//Whether we need to actually build the complete set
BUILD_COMPLETE_EXTENSION_SET:BOOL=ON

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
BUILD_EXTENSIONS:UNINITIALIZED=core_functions

//Build all extension as linkable, overriding DONT_LINK, and don't
// build core.
BUILD_EXTENSIONS_ONLY:BOOL=OFF

//Build the main duckdb library and executable.
BUILD_MAIN_DUCKDB_LIBRARY:BOOL=ON

//Enable the rdtsc instruction.
BUILD_RDTSC:BOOL=OFF

//Build the DuckDB Shell and SQLite API Wrappers
BUILD_SHELL:BOOL=ON

//Build the testing tree.
BUILD_TESTING:BOOL=ON

//Build the unittest runner.
BUILD_UNITTESTS:BOOL=0

//Enable build for clang-tidy, this disables all source files excluding
// the core database. This does not produce a working build.
CLANG_TIDY:BOOL=OFF

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_ADDR2LINE:FILEPATH=/home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/bin/llvm-addr2line

//Choose the type of build, options are: None Debug Release RelWithDebInfo
// MinSizeRel ...
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=Release

//Enable/Disable color output during build.
CMAKE_COLOR_MAKEFILE:BOOL=ON

//LLVM archiver
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/vendor/wasi-sdk/bin/llvm-ar

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_LAUNCHER:UNINITIALIZED=

//Generate index for LLVM archive
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/vendor/wasi-sdk/bin/llvm-ranlib

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=-I/home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/include -D_WASI_EMULATED_PTHREAD -D_WASI_EMULATED_MMAN -D_WASI_EMULATED_SIGNAL -D_WASI_EMULATED_PROCESS_CLOCKS -DDUCKDB_DISABLE_EXTENSION_LOAD -DSQLITE_NOHAVE_SYSTEM -DSQLITE_OMIT_POPEN -fwasm-exceptions -DWEBDB_FAST_EXCEPTIONS=1 -isystem /home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/sysroot/include/wasm32-wasi/c++/v1

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//C++ standard to enforce
CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD:STRING=11

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_LIBRARIES:UNINITIALIZED=-lc++ -lc++abi -lunwind -lc

//LLVM archiver
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/vendor/wasi-sdk/bin/llvm-ar

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_LAUNCHER:UNINITIALIZED=

//Generate index for LLVM archive
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/vendor/wasi-sdk/bin/llvm-ranlib

//Flags used by the C compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS:STRING=-I/home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/include -D_WASI_EMULATED_PTHREAD -D_WASI_EMULATED_MMAN -D_WASI_EMULATED_SIGNAL -D_WASI_EMULATED_PROCESS_CLOCKS

//Flags used by the C compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the C compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_DLLTOOL:FILEPATH=/home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/bin/llvm-dlltool

//Flags used by the linker during all build types.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=/home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/build/duckdb-cmake/agentos-shims/fcntl.o /home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/build/duckdb-cmake/agentos-shims/mlock.o /home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/build/duckdb-cmake/agentos-shims/sched.o -L/home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/build/llvm-runtimes-install/lib -fwasm-exceptions -lwasi-emulated-mman -lwasi-emulated-signal -lwasi-emulated-process-clocks

//Flags used by the linker during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//Enable/Disable output of compile commands during generation.
CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS:BOOL=

//Value Computed by CMake.
CMAKE_FIND_PACKAGE_REDIRECTS_DIR:STATIC=/home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/build/duckdb-cmake/CMakeFiles/pkgRedirects

//User executables (bin)
CMAKE_INSTALL_BINDIR:PATH=bin

//Read-only architecture-independent data (DATAROOTDIR)
CMAKE_INSTALL_DATADIR:PATH=

//Read-only architecture-independent data root (share)
CMAKE_INSTALL_DATAROOTDIR:PATH=share

//Documentation root (DATAROOTDIR/doc/PROJECT_NAME)
CMAKE_INSTALL_DOCDIR:PATH=

//C header files (include)
CMAKE_INSTALL_INCLUDEDIR:PATH=include

//Info documentation (DATAROOTDIR/info)
CMAKE_INSTALL_INFODIR:PATH=

//Object code libraries (lib)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR:PATH=lib

//Program executables (libexec)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBEXECDIR:PATH=libexec

//Locale-dependent data (DATAROOTDIR/locale)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LOCALEDIR:PATH=

//Modifiable single-machine data (var)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LOCALSTATEDIR:PATH=var

//Man documentation (DATAROOTDIR/man)
CMAKE_INSTALL_MANDIR:PATH=

//C header files for non-gcc (/usr/include)
CMAKE_INSTALL_OLDINCLUDEDIR:PATH=/usr/include

//Install path prefix, prepended onto install directories.
CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX:PATH=/usr/local

//Run-time variable data (LOCALSTATEDIR/run)
CMAKE_INSTALL_RUNSTATEDIR:PATH=

//System admin executables (sbin)
CMAKE_INSTALL_SBINDIR:PATH=sbin

//Modifiable architecture-independent data (com)
CMAKE_INSTALL_SHAREDSTATEDIR:PATH=com

//Read-only single-machine data (etc)
CMAKE_INSTALL_SYSCONFDIR:PATH=etc

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_LINKER:FILEPATH=/home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/vendor/wasi-sdk/bin/ld.lld

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_MAKE_PROGRAM:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gmake

CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of modules during

CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of modules during

CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of modules during
// RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
CMAKE_MODULE_PATH:UNINITIALIZED=/home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/cmake

CMAKE_NM:FILEPATH=/home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/vendor/wasi-sdk/bin/llvm-nm

CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME:STATIC=DuckDB

CMAKE_READELF:FILEPATH=/home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/bin/llvm-readelf

CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=-L/home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/build/llvm-runtimes-install/lib -fwasm-exceptions

CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

// during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of shared libraries
// during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//If set, runtime paths are not added when installing shared libraries,
// but are added when building.
CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RPATH:BOOL=NO

//If set, runtime paths are not added when using shared libraries.
CMAKE_SKIP_RPATH:BOOL=NO

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during all build types.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_STRIP:FILEPATH=/home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/vendor/wasi-sdk/bin/llvm-strip

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
CMAKE_SYSROOT:UNINITIALIZED=/home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/sysroot

CMAKE_THREAD_LIBS_INIT:STRING=wasi-emulated-pthread

//The CMake toolchain file
CMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE:FILEPATH=/home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/vendor/wasi-sdk/share/cmake/wasi-sdk.cmake

CMAKE_USE_PTHREADS_INIT:BOOL=0

CMAKE_USE_WIN32_THREADS_INIT:BOOL=0

//If this value is on, makefiles will be generated without the
// .SILENT directive, and all commands will be echoed to the console
// during the make.  This is useful for debugging only. With Visual
// Studio IDE projects all commands are done without /nologo.
CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE:BOOL=FALSE

//Path to the coverage program that CTest uses for performing coverage
// inspection
COVERAGE_COMMAND:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcov

//Extra command line flags to pass to the coverage tool
COVERAGE_EXTRA_FLAGS:STRING=-l

//Trigger a sigabort on an assert failing, instead of throwing
// an exception
CRASH_ON_ASSERT:BOOL=OFF

//How many times to retry timed-out CTest submissions.
CTEST_SUBMIT_RETRY_COUNT:STRING=3

//How long to wait between timed-out CTest submissions.
CTEST_SUBMIT_RETRY_DELAY:STRING=5

//Value Computed by CMake
CoreFunctionsExtension_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/build/duckdb-cmake/extension/core_functions

//Value Computed by CMake
CoreFunctionsExtension_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
CoreFunctionsExtension_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/libs/duckdb/extension/core_functions

//Maximum time allowed before CTest will kill the test.
DART_TESTING_TIMEOUT:STRING=1500

//Debug setting: keep track of outstanding allocations to detect
// memory leaks
DEBUG_ALLOCATION:BOOL=OFF

//Debug setting: Ensure std::move is being used
DEBUG_MOVE:BOOL=OFF

//Debug setting: print a stracktrace on asserts and when testing
// crashes
DEBUG_STACKTRACE:BOOL=OFF

//Debug setting: destroy unpinned buffer-managed blocks
DESTROY_UNPINNED_BLOCKS:BOOL=OFF

//Debug setting: disable assertions
DISABLE_ASSERTIONS:BOOL=OFF

//Disable linking extensions.
DISABLE_BUILTIN_EXTENSIONS:BOOL=OFF

//Disable support for loading and installing extensions
DISABLE_EXTENSION_LOAD:BOOL=1

//Debug setting: disable memory access checks at runtime
DISABLE_MEMORY_SAFETY:BOOL=OFF

//Debug setting: verify correct results without pointer salt
DISABLE_POINTER_SALT:BOOL=OFF

//Debug setting: disable inlining of strings
DISABLE_STR_INLINE:BOOL=OFF

//Disable support for multi-threading
DISABLE_THREADS:BOOL=1

//Disable unity builds.
DISABLE_UNITY:BOOL=OFF

//Disable vptr sanitizer; work-around for sanitizer false positive
// on Macbook M1
DISABLE_VPTR_SANITIZER:BOOL=OFF

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
DUCKDB_EXPLICIT_PLATFORM:UNINITIALIZED=wasm32-wasip1-posix

//Value Computed by CMake
DuckDB_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/build/duckdb-cmake

//Value Computed by CMake
DuckDB_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=ON

//Value Computed by CMake
DuckDB_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/libs/duckdb

//Enable extension auto-installing by default.
ENABLE_EXTENSION_AUTOINSTALL:BOOL=OFF

//Enable extension auto-loading by default.
ENABLE_EXTENSION_AUTOLOADING:BOOL=OFF

//Enable address sanitizer.
ENABLE_SANITIZER:BOOL=0

//Enable thread sanitizer.
ENABLE_THREAD_SANITIZER:BOOL=OFF

//Enable undefined behavior sanitizer.
ENABLE_UBSAN:BOOL=0

//Build the C++ Unit Tests.
ENABLE_UNITTEST_CPP_TESTS:BOOL=0

//Explicitly enable C++ exceptions.
EXPLICIT_EXCEPTIONS:BOOL=OFF

//Export dll symbols on Windows, else import
EXPORT_DLL_SYMBOLS:BOOL=ON

//Export dynamic symbols.
EXPORT_DYNAMIC_SYMBOLS:BOOL=OFF

//Produce extension configuration artifacts instead of building.
// (such as shared vcpkg.json, extensions.txt)
EXTENSION_CONFIG_BUILD:BOOL=OFF

//Default extension directories (;-separated list on win, : on
// unix)
EXTENSION_DIRECTORIES:STRING=~/.duckdb/extensions

//Extension build linking statically with DuckDB. Required for
// building linux loadable extensions.
EXTENSION_STATIC_BUILD:BOOL=ON

//Only load the tests for extensions, don't actually build them;
// useful for testing loadable extensions
EXTENSION_TESTS_ONLY:BOOL=OFF

//Enable checking of assertions, even in release mode
FORCE_ASSERT:BOOL=OFF

//Debug setting: forces sinks/sources to block the first 2 times
// they're called
FORCE_ASYNC_SINK_SOURCE:BOOL=OFF

//Always produce ANSI-colored output (GNU/Clang only).
FORCE_COLORED_OUTPUT:BOOL=OFF

//Force adding a debug define, even in release mode
FORCE_DEBUG:BOOL=OFF

//If enabled, all queries will be logged to the specified path
FORCE_QUERY_LOG:BOOL=OFF

//Unused code objects lead to compiler warnings.
FORCE_WARN_UNUSED:BOOL=OFF

//Build for generating extension_entries.hpp
GENERATE_EXTENSION_ENTRIES:BOOL=OFF

//Debug setting: verify hash collision resolution by setting all
// hashes to 0
HASH_ZERO:BOOL=OFF

//Installation directory for executables
INSTALL_BIN_DIR:PATH=bin

//Installation directory for CMake files
INSTALL_CMAKE_DIR:PATH=lib/cmake/DuckDB

//Installation directory for header files
INSTALL_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=include

//Installation directory for libraries
INSTALL_LIB_DIR:PATH=lib

//Versioning scheme for main branch
MAIN_BRANCH_VERSIONING:BOOL=ON

//Command to build the project
MAKECOMMAND:STRING=/usr/bin/cmake --build . --config "${CTEST_CONFIGURATION_TYPE}"

//Path to the memory checking command, used for memory error detection.
MEMORYCHECK_COMMAND:FILEPATH=MEMORYCHECK_COMMAND-NOTFOUND

//File that contains suppressions for the memory checker
MEMORYCHECK_SUPPRESSIONS_FILE:FILEPATH=

//Are Musl extensions build enabled
MUSL_ENABLED:BOOL=OFF

//Compile targeting the native architecture
NATIVE_ARCH:BOOL=OFF

//Build both architectures on OSX and create a single binary containing
// both.
OSX_BUILD_UNIVERSAL:BOOL=OFF

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
OVERRIDE_GIT_DESCRIBE:UNINITIALIZED=v1.5.0-0-g0123456789

//Override C++ new/delete (only when jemalloc is enabled)
OVERRIDE_NEW_DELETE:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to use a prebuilt version of the DuckDB library, typically
// called libduckdb_static.a
PREBUILT_BINARY:BOOL=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
RE2_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/build/duckdb-cmake/third_party/re2

//enable testing for RE2
RE2_BUILD_TESTING:BOOL=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
RE2_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
RE2_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/libs/duckdb/third_party/re2

//Enable address sanitizer in release mode.
RELEASE_SANITIZER:BOOL=OFF

//Debug setting: enable a more extensive set of verifiers
RUN_SLOW_VERIFIERS:BOOL=OFF

//Whether or not to set the DuckDB Library version and emit versioned
// shared libraries
SET_DUCKDB_LIBRARY_VERSION:BOOL=OFF

//Compile time test on usage of deprecated functions
SHADOW_FORBIDDEN_FUNCTIONS:BOOL=OFF

//Name of the computer/site where compile is being run
SITE:STRING=nathan-dev

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
SKIP_EXTENSIONS:UNINITIALIZED=parquet;jemalloc

//Produce a smaller binary by trimming specialized code paths.
// This can negatively affect performance.
SMALLER_BINARY:BOOL=1

//add clang compile option -fstandalone-debug
STANDALONE_DEBUG:BOOL=OFF

//Set a custom STANDARD_VECTOR_SIZE at compile time
STANDARD_VECTOR_SIZE:STRING=

//Treat warnings as errors
TREAT_WARNINGS_AS_ERRORS:BOOL=OFF

//Should threads be used
USE_WASM_THREADS:BOOL=OFF

//Debug setting: verify vectors (options: dictionary_expression,
// dictionary_operator, constant_operator, sequence_operator, nested_shuffle,
// variant_vector)
VERIFY_VECTOR:BOOL=OFF

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
WASI_SDK_PREFIX:UNINITIALIZED=/home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/vendor/wasi-sdk

//Are DuckDB-Wasm extensions build enabled
WASM_ENABLED:BOOL=OFF

//WebAssembly build with loadable extensions.
WASM_LOADABLE_EXTENSIONS:BOOL=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
duckdb_pg_query_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/build/duckdb-cmake/third_party/libpg_query

//Value Computed by CMake
duckdb_pg_query_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
duckdb_pg_query_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/libs/duckdb/third_party/libpg_query

# INTERNAL cache entries
########################

CMAKE_CACHE_MAJOR_VERSION:INTERNAL=3
//Minor version of cmake used to create the current loaded cache
CMAKE_CACHE_MINOR_VERSION:INTERNAL=25
//Patch version of cmake used to create the current loaded cache
CMAKE_CACHE_PATCH_VERSION:INTERNAL=1

CMAKE_COLOR_MAKEFILE-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//Path to CMake executable.
CMAKE_COMMAND:INTERNAL=/usr/bin/cmake
//Path to cpack program executable.
CMAKE_CPACK_COMMAND:INTERNAL=/usr/bin/cpack

CMAKE_CTEST_COMMAND-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//Path to ctest program executable.
CMAKE_CTEST_COMMAND:INTERNAL=/usr/bin/ctest

//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1

CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS
CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//Name of external makefile project generator.
CMAKE_EXTRA_GENERATOR:INTERNAL=
//Name of generator.
CMAKE_GENERATOR:INTERNAL=Unix Makefiles
//Generator instance identifier.
CMAKE_GENERATOR_INSTANCE:INTERNAL=
//Name of generator platform.
CMAKE_GENERATOR_PLATFORM:INTERNAL=
//Name of generator toolset.
CMAKE_GENERATOR_TOOLSET:INTERNAL=
//Source directory with the top level CMakeLists.txt file for this
// project
CMAKE_HOME_DIRECTORY:INTERNAL=/home/nathan/.herdr/workspaces/agent-os/reg-tests/toolchain/c/libs/duckdb

_Python3_INTERPRETER_PROPERTIES:INTERNAL=Python;3;14;6;64;;cpython-314-x86_64-linux-gnu;/home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/opt/python@3.14/lib/python3.14;/home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/opt/python@3.14/lib/python3.14;/home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/opt/python@3.14/lib/python3.14/site-packages;/home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/opt/python@3.14/lib/python3.14/site-packages
